arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Liverpool: Could Ange Postecoglou resign if fans repeat Man City reaction?
arts.sum: Former Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Kasey Keller tells Sports Mole that he does not expect Ange Postecoglou to walk away from Spurs despite negative fan reactions.

arts.ttl: “Would tell him to come here” – Leicester City player tells Tottenham man to join Foxes
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s Alejo Véliz has been asked to consider a move to Leicester City. That’s come from Leicester’s Facundo Buonanotte, and he mentioned the Spurs man during a chat with Sportscenter, relayed by Olé. arts.ttl: Liverpool ‘position themselves’ to sign player – Reds offer may already have arrived
arts.sum: Two days ago, Foot Mercato reported Liverpool and Paris Saint-Germain are pushing to sign Lyon’s Rayan Cherki in the winter market. Lyon must raise funds to avoid getting relegated to the second division and can do this by selling some players. arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot hopes Ange Postecoglou can win trophies with Tottenham
arts.sum: The pair meet each other in the Premier League on Sunday as a prelude to their two-legged Carabao Cup semi-final in the new year.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Where Spurs v Liverpool will be won and lost
arts.sum: Spurs like to produce explosive starts, scoring nine goals in the first 15 minutes of Premier League matches this season, and conceding just once. Liverpool are strong starters themselves, scoring nine and conceding only three goals in the first 30 minutes of league matches.
